announcement.highlight: Artitude remains free and open to all creators.

problem.title: Collectors are searching for you.
problem.quote: I didn't have time to manage it. The Artitude team structured everything for me in 48h. Simple, effective, and completely transparent.

items.title: You don't have an up-to-date Google profile

items.title: You don't have time to handle it
items.desc: SEO keywords, updates, review management... Properly listing your work takes complex hours you'd rather spend creating.

items.title: Your peers have a visibility strategy
items.desc: Other creators instantly capture the attention of urban collectors simply because they position themselves strategically in local searches.

solution.title: Artitude, your digital showcase managed for you.
solution.badge2: Edit your photos, hours or news in 1 click

steps.label: REGISTRATION
steps.title: You sign up (2 min)
steps.desc: Fill in your studio information in 2 minutes. No complex process — we only collect what's essential.

steps.label: OPTIMISATION
steps.title: We optimise your Google profile
steps.desc: Our experts structure your Google studio profile: aesthetic integration of your photos, keyword definition and schedule configuration.

steps.label: EXPOSURE
steps.title: You're visible on Maps & the Index
steps.desc: Thanks to Artitude, your profile is automatically updated on Google Maps. Collectors can now find you more easily and view your information, photos of your work, your news, your customer reviews, and contact you more easily.

index.title: Thanks to Artitude, your page is automatically updated on Google Maps. Collectors can now find you more easily and check out

boyer.title: Jean-Paul Boyer Studio
boyer.desc: Contemporary sculptures in noble woods and reclaimed metals.

florence-autelin.title: Florence Autelin Studio
florence-autelin.description: Florence Autelin is a photographer whose work explores the instant, the intimate, and movement. Shaped by over twenty years of travels, her practice rests on observation and capturing what emerges in the urgency of the real. Alongside photography, she pursues a more inward pictorial research, centred on emotion and lived experience. These two approaches form a sensitive body of work, made of fragments and resonances. Represented by InRealArt, her work is part of a journey of symbolic recognition and cultural transmission. InRealArt enables business leaders and executives to acquire her works through art leasing solutions.

catherine-senechal.title: Catherine Sénéchal Studio
catherine-senechal.description: Catherine Sénéchal is a self-taught artist from a family of painters and musicians. She has been painting since the age of 15 and has exhibited for over 25 years in major Parisian salons and on recognised online galleries. Her work, guided by instinct and sensitivity, emerges from a free play of colours and papers, without a predefined subject, opening onto a poetic universe. Represented by InRealArt, her work is part of a journey of symbolic recognition and cultural transmission. InRealArt enables business leaders and executives to acquire her works through art leasing solutions.

items.label: Visual visibility
items.headline: A surge in your visual visibility: +50% to +100% impressions every month
items.description: Art only lives if it's seen. Thanks to your Artitude profile, your works and your universe no longer sleep in the shadow of the studio: they're showcased directly on the screens of art lovers. By pushing your visuals, your news and your creations to the top of search engines, we literally double the number of eyes on your work every month. More views mean more hearts won over.

items.label: Reputation
items.headline: The boost to your signature: +20% to +50% recognition for your artist name
items.description: Becoming a local reference doesn't happen by chance. Your Artitude profile acts as a magnet for a qualified audience: it organically and seamlessly suggests your studio to art lovers typing targeted searches ("artist studio", "professional artist", "contemporary art classes"). Month after month, we make sure your name settles into the collective mind, and you become the go-to artist in your region.

items.label: Privacy
items.headline: Your creative bubble, preserved: 100% privacy and peace of mind
items.description: Your studio is a sanctuary, not a train station. Because your creative process demands calm, your Artitude profile fiercely protects your privacy. Sensitive personal details like your exact home address or private phone number can be fully hidden from search engines. We help you control your image, you filter your contacts, and you only welcome the visitors you've chosen.

testimonials.quote: My physical studio visits in Paris doubled in three months. My collectors find me directly on Google Maps.
testimonials.name: Catherine Sénéchal, Painter

testimonials.quote: Since Artitude took over my online presence, my engagement has exploded: my posts reach three times more collectors and my studio hasn't stopped buzzing.
testimonials.name: Eaudalix, Painter

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, signing up and creating your Artitude profile are 100% free, today and always. No credit card required. This service is provided by InRealArt to support the digital visibility of local artists' studios.

items.question: I don't have a website — does it still work?
items.answer: Absolutely. That's the whole point of Artitude. You don't need a heavy, complex website: we configure your profile optimally directly on Google and within our Studio Index.

items.question: What exactly is the Studio Index?
items.answer: It's a public interactive directory integrated into the InRealArt website. It brings together all creators listed by our network and displays your studio on our own map, giving you access to our audience of art enthusiasts.

items.question: How long before I see results?
items.answer: The first results in local Google and Google Maps searches appear as soon as the profile is activated (approximately 48 hours). The real impact and art enthusiast contacts via the Studio Index manifest in the following weeks.

items.question: Do I need to manage my profile updates myself?
items.answer: No. As part of our free offer, you benefit from included monthly updates. Simply send your new studio works or schedule changes to our team, and we take care of the rest.
